AssociateServiceQuotaTemplate.description: Grants permission to associate the Service Quotas template with your organization

CreateSupportCase.description: Grants permission to submit a request to create a support case for an existing quota increase request

DeleteServiceQuotaIncreaseRequestFromTem.description: Grants permission to remove the specified service quota from the service quota template

DisassociateServiceQuotaTemplate.description: Grants permission to disassociate the Service Quotas template from your organization

GetAWSDefaultServiceQuota.description: Grants permission to return the details for the specified service quota, including the AWS default value

GetAssociationForServiceQuotaTemplate.description: Grants permission to retrieve the ServiceQuotaTemplateAssociationStatus value, which tells you if the Service Quotas template is associated with an organization

GetAutoManagementConfiguration.description: Grants permission to retrieve the automatic management of Service Quotas configuration, including notification settings, opt-in type, and excluded quotas

GetQuotaUtilizationReport.description: Grants permission to view the generated report

GetRequestedServiceQuotaChange.description: Grants permission to retrieve the details for a particular service quota increase request

GetServiceQuota.description: Grants permission to return the details for the specified service quota, including the applied value

GetServiceQuotaIncreaseRequestFromTempla.description: Grants permission to retrieve the details for a service quota increase request from the service quota template

ListAWSDefaultServiceQuotas.description: Grants permission to list all default service quotas for the specified AWS service

ListRequestedServiceQuotaChangeHistory.description: Grants permission to request a list of the changes to quotas for a service

ListRequestedServiceQuotaChangeHistoryBy.description: Grants permission to request a list of the changes to specific service quotas

ListServiceQuotaIncreaseRequestsInTempla.description: Grants permission to return a list of the service quota increase requests from the service quota template

ListServiceQuotas.description: Grants permission to list all service quotas for the specified AWS service, in that account, in that Region

ListServices.description: Grants permission to list the AWS services available in Service Quotas

ListTagsForResource.description: Grants permission to view the existing tags on a SQ resource

PutServiceQuotaIncreaseRequestIntoTempla.description: Grants permission to define and add a quota to the service quota template

RequestServiceQuotaIncrease.description: Grants permission to submit the request for a service quota increase

StartAutoManagement.description: Grants permission to enable automatic management of Service Quotas for an AWS account, including notification preferences and excluded quotas configurations

StartQuotaUtilizationReport.description: Grants permission to query quota utilization and create a report for your account

StopAutoManagement.description: Grants permission to stop automatic management of Service Quotas for an AWS account and remove all associated configurations

TagResource.description: Grants permission to associate a set of tags with an existing SQ resource

UntagResource.description: Grants permission to remove a set of tags from a SQ resource, where tags to be removed match a set of customer-supplied tag keys

UpdateAutoManagement.description: Grants permission to update the automatic management of Service Quotas configuration, including notification preferences and excluded quotas

aws:RequestTag/${TagKey}.description: Filters access by the tags that are passed in the request

aws:ResourceTag/${TagKey}.description: Filters access by the tags associated with the resource

aws:TagKeys.description: Filters access by the tag keys that are passed in the request

servicequotas:service.description: Filters access by the specified AWS service
